experiment_title: 铁片与锌片在酸化NaCl溶液中的电化学反应实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="铁片与锌片在酸化NaCl溶液中的电化学反应实验" goal="观察铁片（Fe）和锌片（Zn）在酸化3% NaCl溶液中通电后的电流变化、电极附近气泡或颜色变化，并用铁氰化钾溶液检测Fe电极区域溶液的变化，分析相关反应。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="fe_strip" type="metal_strip" capacity="N/A" />
      <Component id="zn_strip" type="metal_strip" capacity="N/A" />
      <Component id="ammeter_1" type="ammeter" />
      <Component id="wire_1" type="wire" />
      <Component id="wire_2" type="wire" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Acidified_NaCl_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="K3FeCN6_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="NaCl" volume="100 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="fe_strip" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="zn_strip" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_2" />
      <Attach vessel="fe_strip" support="wire_1" id="step_3" />
      <Attach vessel="zn_strip" support="wire_2" id="step_4" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_1" support="ammeter_1" id="step_5" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_2" support="ammeter_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_7" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="K3[Fe(CN)6]" volume="0.1 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_10" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 向烧杯中加入100 mL酸化NaCl溶液，为后续电极反应做准备。
将铁片和锌片插入烧杯，分别用导线连接，并与电流表组成完整电路，搭建电化学反应体系。
通电30秒，观察电流变化及电极附近气泡、颜色等现象。
用滴管取出部分电极附近溶液，加入铁氰化钾溶液，静置后观察颜色变化，分析反应产物。
